    1. apply(Goal, RuleApp)

Interface RuleExecutor<Goal extends @NonNull ProofGoal<Goal>>

All Known Subinterfaces:
BuiltInRule, ExternalSolverRule, RuleExecutor
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule, AbstractBlockContractRule, AbstractLoopContractRule, AbstractLoopInvariantRule, AbstractSideProofRule, AntecTacletExecutor, BlockContractExternalRule, BlockContractInternalRule, CloseAfterMerge, FindTacletExecutor, InfFlowBlockContractInternalRule, InfFlowContractAppTacletExecutor, InfFlowLoopContractInternalRule, InfFlowUseOperationContractRule, InfFlowWhileInvariantRule, IsabelleRule, JmlAssertRule, LoopApplyHeadRule, LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule, LoopScopeInvariantRule, MergeRule, ModalitySideProofRule, NoFindTacletExecutor, ObserverToUpdateRule, OneStepSimplifier, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, RewriteTacletExecutor, SetStatementRule, SMTRule, SuccTacletExecutor, TacletExecutor, TacletExecutor, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WdBlockContractInternalRule, WdWhileInvariantRule, WhileInvariantRule

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ImmutableList<@NonNull Goal>
    apply(@NonNull Goal goal, @NonNull RuleApp ruleApp)
    applies the given rule application to the specified goal

  • Method Details

    • apply

      ImmutableList<@NonNull Goal> apply(@NonNull Goal goal, @NonNull RuleApp ruleApp)
      applies the given rule application to the specified goal
      Parameters:
      goal - the goal that the rule application should refer to.
      ruleApp - the rule application that is executed.
      Returns:
      List of the goals created by the rule which have to be proved. If this is a close-goal-taclet ( this.closeGoal () ), the first goal of the return list is the goal that should be closed (with the constraint this taclet is applied under).
